Stock Lifestyle Images - Brand Assessment

Downloaded from Unsplash. All free to use commercially. Brand validation against Ferni Brand Guidelines.

✅ ON-BRAND (Use These)

Portraits & People

File Description Best Use Brand Score
window-phone-morning.jpg Woman portrait, golden hour, contemplative Testimonials, blog hero ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
contemplative-man.jpg Asian man, warm smile, natural Testimonials ⭐⭐⭐⭐
warm-smile-natural.jpg Woman with topknot, clean, friendly Testimonials ⭐⭐⭐⭐
man-thinking-warm.jpg Black man, genuine smile, outdoors Testimonials, blog ⭐⭐⭐⭐

Lifestyle & Environment

File Description Best Use Brand Score
late-night-cozy.jpg Warm sweater, laptop, wooden desk "Cozy evening" feature ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
cozy-evening-reading.jpg Clean home office, plants, warm light Home office hero ⭐⭐⭐⭐
coffee-morning.jpg Coffee cups from above, warm tones Community/connection ⭐⭐⭐⭐
cafe-phone.jpg Cozy cabin workspace, warm wood Working lifestyle ⭐⭐⭐⭐

Good But Limited Use

File Description Best Use Brand Score
professional-woman.jpg Woman at office window, warm wall Professional context ⭐⭐⭐
golden-hour-reflect.jpg Man with hat, casual Blog variety ⭐⭐⭐
outdoors-earthy.jpg Man in suit, professional Business context ⭐⭐⭐

⚠️ MARGINAL (Use With Caution)

File Issue Can Be Fixed?
morning-phone-woman.jpg Group shot, not individual Crop to detail shot
home-office.jpg Group working, not intimate Background/environment only
diverse-professional.jpg Background slightly cool gray Warm color grade in edit

❌ OFF-BRAND (Do Not Use)

File Issue Brand Violation
window-coffee-woman.jpg Meditation lotus pose "No meditation clichés"
asian-woman-warm.jpg Cool blue background "No cool blues"
diverse-woman-warm.jpg Fashion editorial style, red pants Too trendy, not warm/cozy
walking-golden-hour.jpg Children, not target audience Wrong demographic

📋 Recommended Usage

For Testimonials

  1. window-phone-morning.jpg - Hero testimonial
  2. contemplative-man.jpg - Male testimonial
  3. warm-smile-natural.jpg - Female testimonial
  4. man-thinking-warm.jpg - Diverse testimonial

For Blog Heroes

  1. late-night-cozy.jpg - "2am thoughts" posts
  2. cozy-evening-reading.jpg - Productivity posts
  3. coffee-morning.jpg - Connection/community posts

For Feature Sections

  1. late-night-cozy.jpg - "Always available" section
  2. cafe-phone.jpg - "Work anywhere" section

🎨 Color Grading Notes

Some images may need light color grading to match Ferni's warm palette:

Target Colors:
- Highlights: #F5F1E8 (Paper Cream)
- Midtones: Push toward warm amber
- Shadows: Warm browns, NOT cool grays

Adjustments:
- Temperature: +10-15 (warmer)
- Tint: +5 (toward magenta, away from green)
- Lift blacks slightly for softer shadows

⚠️ Images to Delete

Consider removing these to avoid accidental misuse:

rm window-coffee-woman.jpg  # meditation pose
rm asian-woman-warm.jpg     # cool blue background
rm diverse-woman-warm.jpg   # too editorial
rm walking-golden-hour.jpg  # children

📸 Still Needed

For a full Apple-quality library, you'd still benefit from:

  1. Person on phone, 2am setting - Cozy bedroom, soft lamp light
  2. Commute moment - Train/car, person with AirPods, reflective
  3. Walking outside with phone - Golden hour, alone, contemplative
  4. Kitchen morning - Single person, coffee, phone in hand
  5. Senior person - 60+ age demographic, warm, wise

Last updated: December 2024
